name: Polling Place of the Damned
text:
When Polling Place of the Damned enters the battlefield, hold an election: each player votes for "chaos" or "snacks." You may vote as many times as you like, because nobody checks IDs here.
If chaos wins, roll a six-sided die; on a 5 or 6, create a 1/1 red Goblin creature token.
If snacks win, you may eat a snack. There is no further effect, but morale improves.
{T}: Add {R}.
flavorText: Turnout was high. Integrity was not.
